attempts: destruct BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS as [ _ _ _ Hasso _ Hcomm _ _ _ _ _ _ _ Hidem _ _ _ _ ]. unfold leProp; simpl. rewrite (Hcomm (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2) x1). srun (eauto) use: @eqProp_trans, @eqProp_refl, @andB_compathWith_eqProp unfold: isAssociative, eqPropCompatible2, isIdempotent.

destruct (AbsorptionLaw_andB_orB BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS) as [H_abs1 H_abs2]. assert (H_eq2 : eqProp (orB (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2) x1) x1). rewrite (orB_comm BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2) x1). apply (H_abs2 x1 x2). pose (H_temp := H_abs1 (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2) x1). rewrite H_eq2 in H_temp. unfold leProp; simpl; exact H_temp.

destruct BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS as [_ _ _ andB_assoc _ andB_comm _ _ _ _ _ _ _ andB_idem _ _ _ _]. compute. setoid_rewrite (andB_comm (andB x1 x2) x1). setoid_rewrite <- (andB_assoc x1 x1 x2). setoid_rewrite (andB_idem x1). reflexivity.
